creator: bratanich@mail.ru
text:
At ustanoveke gimp an error takes off that not pozhet to collect port

cc -O3  -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe  -fPIC -pthread -fno-strict-aliasing -Wno-pointer-sign -I/usr/ports/multimedia/gpac-libgpac/work/gpac/include  -I../ -DGPAC_HAVE_CONFIG_H  -fPIC -DPIC -c compositor/mesh.c -o compositor/mesh.opic
